hero.description: CreaClip analyzes your video, detects the best moments, and generates TikTok, Reels & Shorts clips with subtitles automatically.

howItWorks.subtitle: 3 steps. Zero hassle.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop your video. CreaClip transcribes it automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI identifies the best moments. You choose.

features.title: What others don't do
features.feature1Desc: You know your best moments better than AI. Guide it, and it generates only there.
features.feature2Desc: Review BEFORE generating. Edit subtitles in real time. Stop wasting credits.
features.feature3Desc: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube... All formats in 1 click. Stop exporting the same clip 3 times.

socialProof.title: They're already creating their clips on CreaClip
socialProof.testimonial1Quote: I saved 10h per week. The guided pre-selection is a game-changer. My freelance editor at $400/month? Fired.
socialProof.testimonial2Quote: Live preview = no more failed clips. OpusClip generated 20 of which 18 were useless. CreaClip: 100% usable.
socialProof.testimonial3Quote: The 1-click multi-format export saves me 30 min per session. I post on TikTok, Instagram AND YouTube without any hassle.

pricing.title: Simple & transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you're ready

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: CreaClip accepts MP4, MOV and AVI files up to 500 MB. Most videos from smartphones, cameras and recording software work right away.
faq.q2: How long does it take to generate a clip?
faq.a2: Transcription typically takes 1 to 3 minutes depending on the video length. Clip generation happens in a few seconds directly in your browser.
faq.a3: Yes. Your videos are stored in a private space accessible only by your account. We use Supabase with strict security policies (Row Level Security).
faq.q4: Is the processing done on your servers?
faq.a4: Transcription and AI analysis go through our secure servers. Video editing (cutting, subtitles, cropping) is done entirely in your browser using FFmpeg WASM — your videos are not sent to a third-party server.
faq.a5: Absolutely. You can change the font, size, colors, outline, position and background. You can also save presets to reuse on your future clips.
faq.q6: Can I cancel my Pro subscription?
faq.a6: Yes, at any time. You keep access to Pro features until the end of the paid period, then your account automatically reverts to the free plan.
